title: PaperGraph 联网测试
objective: 验证文献检索到知识缺口探测的闭环

papergraph.title: AI Feynman: A symbolic regression algorithm inspired by physics
papergraph.abstract: We introduce AI Feynman, a new approach to symbolic regression that combines neural network fitting with symbolic manipulation. It uses dimensional analysis, polynomial fitting, and functional composition to recursively break down complex equations into simpler components. Our method discovers exact analytic expressions for physical laws from raw data without prior knowledge of the underlying equations.
papergraph.conclusion: AI Feynman successfully recovers fundamental physical laws (e.g., Newton's law of gravitation, Coulomb's law) from synthetic data. It demonstrates how autonomous symbolic reasoning agents can accelerate scientific discovery by bridging machine learning and domain-specific heuristics. Future work includes scaling to higher-dimensional systems and integrating with automated experiment design.
papergraph.method: symbolic regression that combines neural network fitting with symbolic manipulation; uses dimensional analysis, polynomial fitting, and functional composition to recursively break down complex equations into simpler components
papergraph.scenario: discovering exact analytic expressions for physical laws from raw data without prior knowledge of the underlying equations
papergraph.contribution: A new approach to symbolic regression that discovers exact analytic expressions for physical laws from raw data without prior knowledge of the underlying equations
papergraph.limitation: Conclusion: AI Feynman successfully recovers fundamental physical laws (e.g., Newton's law of gravitation, Coulomb's law) from synthetic data. It demonstrates how autonomous symbolic reasoning agents can accelerate scientific discovery by bridging machine learning and domain-specific heuristics. Fut...[truncated]
